hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams accelerate alert triage and case handling by connecting provider results with AI-powered next-action recommendations and audit-ready decision logs.

problem_title: Compliance reviews depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inefficiencies when provider outputs remain unconnected and case workflows require repetitive manual review steps. This fragmentation creates gaps in audit trails and slows down critical risk decision-making across digital asset compliance processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, AI-assisted next-action insights, review queues, decision logs and evidence into one streamlined workflow enabling operations teams to speed case handling and maintain audit readiness.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs with AI-assisted review to route alerts, create cases, record decisions and preserve evidence within one structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected platform to connect provider outputs into structured reviews, cases, decisions, regulatory updates and audit evidence within one workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and issues AI-supported next actions to help compliance teams manage risk-based workflows efficiently and consistently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and linked evidence, enabling compliance teams to maintain an audit-ready record for reviews, inspections and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates above KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs into a consolidated compliance workflow without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but connects their outputs to create an auditable compliance control layer with workflow automation and evidence management.
final_title: Structure compliance reviews with AI recommendations
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports VASP operations by connecting provider results, AI next actions, case workflows and audit-ready records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
